name: Taylor Consulting, Inc.
summary: Taylor Consulting, Inc. invests in, acquires, and operates real estate properties in the United States. It operates through two segments, Real Estate Investing and Real Estate Brokerage Services. The company operates a self-storage facility in Merkel, Texas; and holds properties for resale located in Nolan and Taylor Counties, Texas. It also operates as a real estate broker. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Houston, Texas.
